## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rimkus and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and next steps for their partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX presented initial content strategy focused on 4 key clusters aligned with Rimkus' BES priorities](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Rimkus provided crucial context on compliance language, technical depth needs, and existing content to leverage](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)
  - [Next steps include developing a 40-50 topic content calendar and starting with a calibration blog post](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=2259.0)
  - [GrowthX will explore content refresh opportunities for existing Rimkus articles/blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=2532.0)

## Topics

### Content Generation Process and Tools

  - [GrowthX uses custom AI platform Atlas with artifacts (audience personas, company context, writing guidelines) to generate content](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Process involves multiple human review steps for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Can generate AI images, but illustrations/graphics work better than human-like imagery](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [Aiming for 5 blog posts per week after initial calibration period](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=2324.0)

### Content Strategy and Clusters

  - [4 initial clusters proposed: 1) Structural engineering & code compliance, 2) Due diligence for real estate/investments, 3) Mechanical, electrical & life safety consulting, 4) Energy efficiency & resilience](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
  - [Clusters align with Rimkus BES priorities and allow for focused authority building](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Strategy supports performance reporting via Looker dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)

### Compliance and Technical Language Considerations

  - [Cannot guarantee specific results due to potential legal implications](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=2034.0)
  - [Need to use careful language like "can help ensure" rather than definitive promises](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=2196.0)
  - [BES content has more flexibility than forensics content](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=2140.0)
  - [Writing guidelines will be updated to reflect these nuances](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=1992.0)

### Existing Content Optimization

  - [Rimkus has limited past SEO efforts, seeking "low-hanging fruit" improvements](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=2378.0)
  - [GrowthX can assist with content refreshes, starting with analyzing \~9 blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=2577.0)
  - ["Articles" section contains additional content (email campaigns, external publications) that could be leveraged](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=2602.0)
  - [Will use SEMrush/Google Search Console data to prioritize high-potential content for updates](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=2581.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to prepare 40-50 topic content calendar for review next week](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=2259.0)
  - [Rimkus to provide Google Search Console access for more accurate traffic analysis](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=2940.0)
  - [GrowthX to analyze existing blog/article content for refresh opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=2890.0)
  - [Develop first "calibration" blog post for detailed Rimkus feedback](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=2281.0)
  - [Erik to send clear outlines of needed access/invitations](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=2986.0)
  - [Rimkus to discuss internal process for content publishing access](https://fathom.video/share/7BAJg41Go9iRNxsaZHzCkM5c_d9KEw3N?tab=summary&timestamp=2341.0)
